title: Dipterygia foliosa
taxonomy: Dipterygia foliosa is a genus of moths in the family Noctuidae. It is a type of noctuid moth, with the species being found in South America. The classification of Dipterygia foliosa places it within the phylum Arthropoda, class Insecta, order Lepidoptera, and family Noctuidae. The genus Dipterygia is a part of the subfamily Noctuinae. Further classification includes the order and family of Lepidoptera and Noctuidae respectively.
